title: Pipeline Lean Redesign — Context Engineering Overhaul

output.summary: Strategic — process-level change to pipeline context engineering. Research + gap analysis + CEO clarification before changes.
Read directive.md — 4 requirements: research best practices, internal gap analysis, CEO clarification, lean implementation.
Read vision.md, agent registry, previous pipeline-quality-and-trim directive (completed). No preferences.md found.
Challenge deferred — CEO clarification is built into this directive's R3.
External research (6 Anthropic + 2 OpenAI articles) + internal gap analysis (29K words, 40 files). Found 7 conflicts, 10 missing enforcement gates.
output.findings: Context rot confirmed — 15-30% degradation at 8K-16K instruction tokens. Harness engineering > context engineering. 3-7 examples > 20 rules.

output.summary: CEO approved aggressive rewrite plan. Requirements: worktree isolation, status updates must work for dashboard, framework-agnostic (support non-CC users).
Aggressive rewrite completed. 15,847 → 8,966 words (-43%). 09-execute split into 3 files. 7 conflicts fixed. 5 enforcement gates added. Framework-agnostic pass applied.

CTO review: 3 blocking issues found and fixed (brainstorm doc link, browser-test gate artifact, lightweight skip table). 5 non-blocking also fixed. 2 rounds of 4-agent review (pipeline integrity, gates, framework-agnostic, skill quality). All pass.
Digest written. 4 follow-up candidates identified (medium/low risk). Lessons captured. Stale docs checked — 25 historical refs to SKILL.md (expected, no action).
CEO approved. Squash-merged to main as commit 3aceb02. Single commit for easy revert if needed.
